description: A demo scene showcasing speech bubbles, range highlights, summon control, screen fades, supertitles, and announcements. A wounded sage hides at the edge of a clearing where two cultists are completing a dark rite.
objective: Demo: explore the forest, talk to the sage, witness the ritual, and choose how to resolve it.
customIntroduction: Mist clings to the forest floor and a hush rides on the breeze — the kind of quiet that follows when every animal has gone still at once. To the south where the path opens, you can still see daylight; ahead, the canopy crowds together and a faint coppery smell drifts on the air. Somewhere deeper in, a low rhythmic chant rises and falls.
customContext:
This is a DEMO encounter that showcases the engine's visual-effect triggers. **All visual effects in this scene are driven by the encounter triggers, not by you.** YOU MUST NOT call `show_supertitle`, `show_announcement`, `fade_screen`, or `npc_speaks` anywhere in this encounter — the triggers fire them at the right moments. Your job is narrative prose only.

LAYOUT — the player spawns at the southern edge (around row 19). The Wandering Sage stands at the western treeline (around col 5, row 8) — neutral, frightened, willing to share what she has seen if the player approaches calmly. Two Cultists stand at the northern clearing (cols 12–14, row 4) tending a chalk-drawn circle around a guttering brazier. They are NEUTRAL on spawn; they only attack if the player advances into the circle or strikes first.

WHAT THE TRIGGERS HANDLE (FOR YOUR REFERENCE — DO NOT REPLICATE):
 - On encounter start: a 'DEMONIC FOREST' supertitle is shown deterministically.
 - When the player approaches the Sage: her warning line shows as a speech bubble.
 - Mid-forest: an announcement card fades in and is mirrored to the Event Log.
 - At the cultists' clearing: a cinematic transition plays (50% dim → 'THE RITE COMPLETES' supertitle → 'A black sigil burns itself into the clearing floor.' announcement → restore).
 - On encounter completion: a closing announcement fires.

YOUR JOB AT EACH TRIGGERED MOMENT — write ONE short paragraph (≤3 sentences) of in-world prose that fits the beat the trigger just played. Quote the Sage's line verbatim in your prose (the bubble shows the same text). Do not narrate the visuals themselves (don't say 'a title appears' or 'the screen darkens') — let the trigger carry that.

PLAYER MECHANICS YOU MAY NARRATE AROUND:
 - Range highlight (automatic): every spell cast paints its range. Narrate spells normally.
 - Summon control: if the player is a Wizard with Mage Hand, seed opportunities that invite its use — a fallen amulet just past the brazier's edge, a lever across a 20-ft pit. The player drives the summon themselves via the DIRECT button.

RESOLUTION PATHS:
 - If the player INTERRUPTS the ritual (attacks the cultists, dispels the circle, drags one out), call `set_disposition` on both cultists to 'enemy' then `trigger_combat`. Combat victory auto-completes the chapter.
 - If the player LETS the ritual complete and flees / parleys with whatever rises, narrate the aftermath in prose only. Call `set_world_flag` name 'demonic_forest_resolved' value true when the player leaves the forest.
 - If the player TALKS the cultists down (clever roleplay, intimidation roll on a `faction_standing` check, etc.), narrate them packing up. Call `set_world_flag` name 'demonic_forest_resolved' value true.

TONE: hushed, watchful, supernatural. The forest itself feels wrong. Cultists are devoted, not unhinged. The Wandering Sage is afraid but lucid.

then.text: They've been chanting for hours. Don't go any closer.

then.message: The player approached the Wandering Sage. Her warning line has already shown as a speech bubble. Write ONE short paragraph (≤3 sentences) describing her stepping out from behind the tree, frightened, with her warning quoted verbatim. Then ask what the player does. DO NOT call show_supertitle, show_announcement, fade_screen, or npc_speaks — the triggers handle visuals.

The player stepped into the mid-forest. An UNFOCUSED announcement has already fired (visible as an edge-feathered text overlay; the UI stayed live and the world kept ticking). Write ONE short atmospheric paragraph (≤3 sentences) and ask what they do. DO NOT call show_supertitle, show_announcement, fade_screen, or npc_speaks.

then.text: A black sigil burns itself into the clearing floor.

then.message: The player reached the northern clearing as the cultists completed their rite. The cinematic has ALREADY played (50% dim, 'The rite completes.' announcement, 'A black sigil burns itself into the clearing floor.' announcement, restore). Pick up from there: write ONE short paragraph (≤3 sentences) describing the cultists turning and the smoldering sigil. Then ask what the player does. DO NOT call show_supertitle, show_announcement, fade_screen, or npc_speaks.

then.text: The forest exhales. You have resolved the demonic rite.
